race.comment: HIGHGROVE ROSE (10) tackled city class latest when seventh at Eagle Farm, finishing 5.5 lengths from the winner. Will appreciate a drop in grade. Well placed so expecting a strong run. PINK VIXEN (9) has been in the market at her last couple of starts but hasn't made an impression, last start finishing fifth over 1350m at Ipswich. Rates highly in this line up and gets her chance. The well-related KAAZI (2) (half to 4xG1 winner Zaaki) missed the placings two runs back then was never in contention last start when 10 lengths away in eighth over 1800m at Randwick Kensington. Finds a much easier assignment and can take this out. KIRORO PEAK (3) ran a better race last start to finish a close second over 2200m at Eagle Farm after missing the placings at the previous appearance. No surprise to see him in the frame.
